name: wrkflw
description: Workflow-oriented planning and execution helper for staged engineering delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Stage work from idea to PR
interface.longDescription: Provides workflow-guided discussion, local workflow workspace scaffolding, and reusable prompts for planning, OpenSpec, implementation, and review.
defaultPrompt: Use wrkflw:discuss to shape this initiative.
Break this work into small mergeable slices.
Set gates, OpenSpec steps, and PR-sized tasks.
If a gate is rejected, record the reason and route the workflow to the correct rework stage.
Support wrkflw:approve, wrkflw:reject, wrkflw:rework, wrkflw:refine, wrkflw:rework-item, wrkflw:proceed-only, wrkflw:defer, and wrkflw:next as workflow control commands.
